title: BST Insertion — Infix Output
description: Start with an empty BST. Insert n integers one by one (duplicates are ignored). Output the in-order (sorted) traversal of the final BST.
inputSpec: First line: n. Second line: n integers to insert in order.
outputSpec: The in-order traversal: n integers sorted in non-decreasing order, space-separated.

botCodes.code: let()=let n=Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id in let a=Array.init n(fun _->Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id) in let module S=Set.Make(Int) in let s=Array.fold_left(fun s x->S.add x s)S.empty a in S.iter(fun x->Printf.printf"%d " x) s;print_newline()
